requirement_topic.en: Dangerous-Goods Transport — UN 38.3 and shipping documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品运输——UN 38.3与运输单证
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品運輸——UN 38.3與運輸單證

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries are classified as dangerous goods for international transport regardless of destination country. Shipments to Ghana by sea （through Tema or Takoradi） or by air must comply with the relevant international dangerous-goods regimes: the UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3 （UN 38.3）, the IMDG Code for sea freight, and the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions for air freight. Each cell and battery type must hold a UN 38.3 test summary, be correctly packed, marked, and labelled （UN numbers UN3480/UN3481 for lithium-ion, UN3090/UN3091 for lithium-metal）, and travel with the required transport documentation and, where applicable, state-of-charge limits for air. These obligations sit on top of, and are independent from, GSA product-conformity requirements.
summary.zh: 锂电芯及电池在国际运输中无论目的地国家均被列为危险品。经海运（特马Tema或塔科拉迪Takoradi）或空运发往加纳的货物，须符合相关国际危险品制度：联合国《关于危险货物运输的建议书·试验和标准手册》第38.3节（UN 38.3）、海运的IMDG规则，以及空运的IATA危险品规则/ICAO技术细则。每种电芯和电池型号须持有UN 38.3测试摘要，正确包装、标记和加贴标签（锂离子UN3480/UN3481，锂金属UN3090/UN3091），并随附所需运输单证，空运时适用荷电状态限制。该等义务叠加于GSA产品合格评定要求之上且彼此独立。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯及電池在國際運輸中無論目的地國家均被列為危險品。經海運（特馬Tema或塔科拉迪Takoradi）或空運發往迦納的貨物，須符合相關國際危險品制度：聯合國《關於危險貨物運輸的建議書·試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節（UN 38.3）、海運的IMDG規則，以及空運的IATA危險品規則/ICAO技術細則。每種電芯和電池型號須持有UN 38.3測試摘要，正確包裝、標記和加貼標籤（鋰離子UN3480/UN3481，鋰金屬UN3090/UN3091），並隨附所需運輸單證，空運時適用荷電狀態限制。該等義務疊加於GSA產品合格評定要求之上且彼此獨立。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — lithium battery transport testing
IMDG Code (maritime) — entry to Tema / Takoradi by sea
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions (air)

summary.en: China applies the same UN 38.3 testing basis through its domestic dangerous-goods transport rules and standards （for example GB 38031 for traction batteries and the GB/T adoptions reflecting UN 38.3 for transport testing）, and Chinese exporters routinely obtain UN 38.3 test summaries and dangerous-goods transport documents for outbound shipments. Because UN 38.3 is an international transport standard rather than a market-access mark, a properly issued UN 38.3 test summary prepared for export is generally usable for shipments to Ghana — this is the one area where Chinese export documentation aligns closely with the destination requirement, subject to correct packing, marking, labelling, and carrier acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通过其国内危险品运输规则和标准（例如动力电池的GB 38031及反映UN 38.3运输测试的GB/T采用版本）适用相同的UN 38.3测试基础，中国出口商通常会为出境货物取得UN 38.3测试摘要和危险品运输单证。由于UN 38.3是国际运输标准而非市场准入标志，为出口正确出具的UN 38.3测试摘要一般可用于发往加纳的货物——这是中国出口文件与目的地要求高度一致的领域，但仍须正确包装、标记、加贴标签并获承运人接受。
summary.zht: 中國透過其國內危險品運輸規則和標準（例如動力電池的GB 38031及反映UN 38.3運輸測試的GB/T採用版本）適用相同的UN 38.3測試基礎，中國出口商通常會為出境貨物取得UN 38.3測試摘要和危險品運輸單證。由於UN 38.3是國際運輸標準而非市場准入標誌，為出口正確出具的UN 38.3測試摘要一般可用於發往迦納的貨物——這是中國出口文件與目的地要求高度一致的領域，但仍須正確包裝、標記、加貼標籤並獲承運人接受。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test summary as prepared for export (recognised internationally)
GB 38031 and related GB/T transport-testing standards reflecting UN 38.3

gap.en: Transport is the area of closest alignment: a correctly prepared UN 38.3 test summary used for Chinese export is generally valid for shipments to Ghana, because UN 38.3 is an international standard, not a national market-access mark. Residual gaps are operational rather than regulatory-divergence: (1) the UN 38.3 test summary must match the exact cell/battery model and revision shipped; (2) packing, UN-number marking （UN3480/UN3481/UN3090/UN3091）, hazard labelling, and the dangerous-goods declaration must meet IMDG （sea to Tema/Takoradi） or IATA/ICAO （air） rules; (3) air shipments may face state-of-charge and quantity limits. UN 38.3 covers transport only and does not substitute for GSA product conformity, NCA approval, or the importer obligation.
gap.zh: 运输是最为一致的领域：用于中国出口的正确UN 38.3测试摘要一般对发往加纳的货物有效，因为UN 38.3是国际标准而非国家市场准入标志。残余差距是操作性的而非监管分歧：（1）UN 38.3测试摘要须与实际发运的电芯/电池型号及版本完全一致；（2）包装、UN编号标记（UN3480/UN3481/UN3090/UN3091）、危险标签及危险品申报须符合IMDG（海运至特马/塔科拉迪）或IATA/ICAO（空运）规则；（3）空运可能面临荷电状态和数量限制。UN 38.3仅涵盖运输，不能替代GSA产品合格评定、NCA核准或进口商义务。
gap.zht: 運輸是最為一致的領域：用於中國出口的正確UN 38.3測試摘要一般對發往迦納的貨物有效，因為UN 38.3是國際標準而非國家市場准入標誌。殘餘差距是操作性的而非監管分歧：（1）UN 38.3測試摘要須與實際發運的電芯/電池型號及版本完全一致；（2）包裝、UN編號標記（UN3480/UN3481/UN3090/UN3091）、危險標籤及危險品申報須符合IMDG（海運至特馬/塔科拉迪）或IATA/ICAO（空運）規則；（3）空運可能面臨荷電狀態和數量限制。UN 38.3僅涵蓋運輸，不能替代GSA產品合格評定、NCA核准或進口商義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 testing and dangerous-goods packing/marking/labelling/documentation required for sea (IMDG) and air (IATA/ICAO) shipments to Ghana, independent of GSA product conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 testing and dangerous-goods transport documentation required for outbound shipments under Chinese and international transport rules

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (Section 38.3, lithium batteries)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lithium battery transport to Ghana requires UN 38.3 testing plus correct dangerous-goods packing, marking, labelling, and documentation under IMDG (sea to Tema/Takoradi) or IATA/ICAO (air). This is the area where Chinese export documentation aligns most closely with the destination requirement: a correctly prepared UN 38.3 test summary is generally usable, provided it matches the exact model shipped. UN 38.3 covers transport only and does not substitute for GSA product conformity, NCA approval, or the importer obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 锂电池运往加纳须进行UN 38.3测试，并按IMDG（海运至特马/塔科拉迪）或IATA/ICAO（空运）规则正确包装、标记、加贴标签及备齐单证。这是中国出口文件与目的地要求最为一致的领域：正确出具的UN 38.3测试摘要一般可用，前提是与实际发运型号一致。UN 38.3仅涵盖运输，不能替代GSA产品合格评定、NCA核准或进口商义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 鋰電池運往迦納須進行UN 38.3測試，並按IMDG（海運至特馬/塔科拉迪）或IATA/ICAO（空運）規則正確包裝、標記、加貼標籤及備齊單證。這是中國出口文件與目的地要求最為一致的領域：正確出具的UN 38.3測試摘要一般可用，前提是與實際發運型號一致。UN 38.3僅涵蓋運輸，不能替代GSA產品合格評定、NCA核准或進口商義務。
